subject: [AAI] Upgrading to the latest images & configs that include v25/v26 XSDs
commit_message:
[AAI] Upgrading to the latest images & configs that include v25/v26 XSDs

Issues happening for SO so trying to upgrade
to the latest images for e2e test to pass
gating

Issue-ID: AAI-3459
Change-Id: Iaf78e74f9e099fb54cc82cb86a17d84a9cdf0e95
Signed-off-by: wr148d <wr148d@att.com>
